title: Auto Tool
description: Tired of fumbling through your hotbar to find the right tool for the job? Say goodbye to the hassle with Auto Tool!
body:
Auto Tool - Master Your Minecraft Tools Like Never Before!


Check out Partner Discord [Pixel Dream Studios](https://discord.gg/pixel-dream-studios-872788557553610802)

Check out my discord - > [Bandit Discord](https://discord.gg/F2deya67dm)

Overview:

Tired of fumbling through your hotbar to find the right tool for the job? Say goodbye to the hassle with Auto Tool! This mod is your ultimate companion for efficient and seamless gameplay, automatically switching to the best tool in your inventory based on the block you're about to break. Whether you're mining deep underground, chopping wood in the forest, or clearing dirt for your next big project, Auto Tool ensures you're always equipped with the perfect tool, instantly.

Features:
Automatic Tool Switching: Auto Tool intelligently detects the block you’re targeting and switches to the most effective tool in your hotbar, saving you time and effort.
Minecraft Integrated Design: Crafted to feel like a natural extension of Minecraft, Auto Tool blends seamlessly with the game's mechanics while enhancing your experience.
Efficient and Lightweight: Designed with performance in mind, Auto Tool runs smoothly without impacting your game’s performance, even in the most demanding environments.
Customizable: Tweak settings to match your playstyle, ensuring that Auto Tool works just the way you like it.
Supports All Tools: Whether it’s a pickaxe, axe, shovel, hoe, or sword, Auto Tool has got you covered.

**Keybind to disable and enable feature as well!**

Why Choose Auto Tool?

In the vast world of Minecraft, time is precious. Auto Tool streamlines your gameplay, making every action faster and more intuitive. Imagine never having to stop mid-task to find the right tool; Auto Tool does that for you, allowing you to focus on what really matters—building, exploring, and conquering your world!

Perfect for All Players:
Survivalists: Enhance your efficiency and survive the harshest environments with the right tool at your fingertips.
Builders: Keep your creative flow uninterrupted with automatic tool switching.
Adventurers: Always be ready for whatever the world throws at you, with the perfect tool equipped in an instant.
Get Started:

Download Auto Tool today and transform the way you play Minecraft. Experience the game like never before with the power of automatic tool switching, and become the master of your tools!
